name: vscode-worktree-window-title
description: Show the git worktree folder name in your VS Code window title

worktreeTitle.template.markdownDescription:
Window title template. Use `${worktreeName}` for the worktree folder name. Standard VS Code variables like `${dirty}`, `${activeEditorShort}`, `${separator}` also work. **This replaces `window.title` when set.**

Example: `${worktreeName}${separator}${dirty}${activeEditorShort}`
